tests.name: pipeline/plugins/treesitter/runtime/projectRoots/goModule reads the Go module name from go.mod
pipeline/plugins/treesitter/runtime/projectRoots/goModule trims module names and reuses the cached lookup for the same project root
pipeline/plugins/treesitter/runtime/projectRoots/goModule returns the matching package directory for root and nested imports
pipeline/plugins/treesitter/runtime/projectRoots/goModule returns null when go.mod is missing or does not declare a root-level module line
pipeline/plugins/treesitter/runtime/projectRoots/goModule returns null for external imports even when the workspace has a valid module name
